description: CompositionCream printed kurta made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves, Mandarin neck with buttoned chest placket with lace detailing, has a princess waistline with pleats on the bust and a curved hemFittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry in shadeHot iron inside outEthnic is back with a bang with this cream printed kurta from w! Look ethnically hip in this princess waist kurta, while the pure cotton fabric keeps you absolutely fresh and comfortable through the day. Team it with leggings or a loose kameez, heeled slippers and chunky accessories for a chic look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in kurtasHeight-5.6", Chest-32"
